surfaces.name: object_summary
surfaces.primary_question: How often and how broadly is each source object showing up in the current receipt feed?
surfaces.derivation_rule: group receipts by object_ref and keep counts, latest timestamps, and bounded posture flags

surfaces.name: repeated_window_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What changed across bounded date windows without turning the result into one global score?
surfaces.derivation_rule: group receipts by observed_at date and keep counts plus bounded window signals

surfaces.name: route_progression_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What bounded multi-axis movement is visible on each named route?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate progression_delta_receipt payloads by route_ref and sum axis deltas

surfaces.name: fork_calibration_summary
surfaces.primary_question: How are route forks actually being chosen and how often do they carry realized outcome refs?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate decision_fork_receipt payloads by route_ref and chosen_branch

surfaces.name: automation_pipeline_summary
surfaces.primary_question: How close is a named automation pipeline to seed-ready bounded use?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate automation_candidate_receipt payloads by pipeline_ref and readiness flags
